opportunities.specific_product: LED gold vanity mirror with lights
opportunities.transformation_hook: Bare dorm desk to $34 glam vanity corner in one weekend
opportunities.before_state: Empty cinderblock dorm desk with no personality, harsh single desk lamp
opportunities.after_state: Styled vanity corner with a glowing LED mirror, small tray, and cozy ambient light
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy is running a heavy dorm-decor pin cluster (headboards, curtains, vanity mirrors, diffusers) right as mid-July back-to-school shopping ramps up.

opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: $45 stretch cover turns a pet-hair couch into a like-new sofa
opportunities.before_state: Worn, stained, pet-hair-covered couch that looks years overdue for replacement
opportunities.after_state: Smooth, tailored-looking slipcovered sofa that reads brand new
buyer_intent_keywords: cheap way to update old couch
opportunities.why_now: BHG's 'designer Amazon recommendations vs. outdated trends' pin is pointing readers toward budget furniture refreshes like slipcovers instead of buying new pieces.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $89 LED mirror swap makes a dated bathroom look fully renovated
opportunities.before_state: Dim, builder-grade bathroom mirror under harsh overhead lighting
opportunities.after_state: Bright, hotel-style backlit mirror that reads like a full remodel
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's bath-spaces pin is circulating this week showcasing lighting-driven makeovers, and mirror/lighting swaps are the cheapest entry point into that look.

opportunities.transformation_hook: $65 gold floor lamp turns a dark, empty corner into a styled vignette
opportunities.before_state: Dark, empty living room corner with no light source
opportunities.after_state: Warmly lit corner styled around the gold 3-globe lamp as a focal point
opportunities.why_now: HGTV's midcentury-modern living room pin and Apartment Therapy's own gold floor lamp pin are live simultaneously, signaling the aesthetic is surfacing across publishers at once.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm side sleeper contour pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: $40 contour pillow fixes the flat, lumpy pillow stack side sleepers hate
opportunities.before_state: Mismatched, flattened pillow pile causing neck pain
opportunities.after_state: Neatly stacked, supportive contour pillow setup on a made bed
buyer_intent_keywords: pillow for neck pain side sleeper
opportunities.why_now: Apartment Therapy's dorm-bed and headboard pins are driving bedroom-comfort searches, and neck-pain pillow demand is a steady high-intent category riding that same traffic.
